message.content: @startuml actor "用户信息正确请求URL" as User1 #9370DB participant UrlFilterSecurityInterceptor #82B54C database UrlMetadataSourceService #DAA6BD entity UrlConfigAttribute #FADCEA control UrlAccessDecisionManager #FFDD44 User1 ->>UrlFilterSecurityInterceptor : Authentication Request\n activate UrlFilterSecurityInterceptor UrlFilterSecurityInterceptor->>UrlMetadataSourceService:getAttributes(Object object) create participant UrlConfigAttribute UrlMetadataSourceService-->UrlConfigAttribute:UrlConfigAttribute(HttpServletRequest httpServletRequest)\n note right of UrlMetadataSourceService:\n 注意\n根据request中的url获取当前访问需要哪些权限 UrlMetadataSourceService-->>UrlAccessDecisionManager:decide(Authentication authentication,\ Object\ object, Collection\ configAttributes)\n destroy user1 @enduml
